headline: P&L exposure: ₹182.2 Cr direct compliance/legal risk (engine estimate) + ₹125.7 Cr indirect/contingent (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.1x likely due to reputational and compliance overhang; margin erosion of 10.0 bps; revenue at risk: -₹22.8 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital could rise by 20-40 bps (BRSR: non-disclosure penalty precedent), with possible ESG fund outflows if ratings are downgraded.

Triggers BRSR (mandatory), GRI:207 (rationale: Triggered by GST demand notices, transfer-pricing disputes, tax-disclosure gaps, or related-party transaction investigation. Complements ESRS G1.) (tax/governance), COSO ERM, and S&P Global ESG frameworks; regulatory deadlines and scrutiny from RBI and SEBI; penalty precedent up to ₹50 Cr (engine estimate) per violation.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹182.2 Cr direct compliance/legal risk (engine estimate) + ₹125.7 Cr indirect/contingent (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹22.8 Cr indirect revenue loss (engine estimate)
